rules.description: Complex fee validation: enrollment must be exactly Rs.1500 above catalog fee, pass modulo/divisibility checks, stay within 1.0–1.5× ratio, and meet minimum 75% attendance threshold
rules.condition: (enrollment.fee - catalog.fee) == 1500 and (enrollment.fee + catalog.fee) // 2 == catalog.fee + 750 and (enrollment.fee - catalog.fee) * 2 // 3 == 1000 and enrollment.fee % 500 == 0 and catalog.fee ** 0 == 1 and (exam.min_attendance_pct * enrollment.fee) / 100 >= catalog.fee - 200 and enrollment.fee / catalog.fee > 1 and enrollment.fee / catalog.fee <= 1.5 and enrollment.fee - catalog.fee != 0 and 75 <= exam.min_attendance_pct <= 100
rules.on_failure: Fix enrollment fee, attendance, or fee ratio — all arithmetic sub-checks must pass

rules.description: Exam eligibility conditional waiver: If the course name contains 'Basics' or 'Intro', the student is eligible if they have at least 75% attendance (even if fee is not cleared). For all other courses, the student must have both cleared the exam fee (fee_cleared='Y') and be marked eligible (is_eligible='Y').
rules.condition: Check if the course name contains 'Basics' or 'Intro'. If yes, verify attendance is 75% or higher. If no, verify that the student has paid the exam fee and is eligible.
rules.on_failure: Ensure attendance is >= 75% for introductory courses, or clear fees and mark eligible for advanced courses
